name: A New Eden: Dupli-Kate
description:
I actually had a bot idea for once. The intro for this was hell to write, but I managed. Sorry about the Malepov, I wanted to make it Anypov but I couldn't think of a way to get it to work. But then again, I'm also not too knowledgeable about bible stuff, so if you guys know a way too make it work, feel free to tell me.

Art by: @WrenZephyr (You can see the original image here too!)

Had to nuke the image because the shitty algorithm kept detecting NSFW.

V1.1 23/06/25: Tried to add the full image back. (Didn't work.) Replaced it with a better one though.
creator: BananaCatMan
